name: eskerda-renfe-skill
description: RENFE Cercanías and Rodalies schedule, alerts, and delay queries via GTFS. Auto-classifies trains as express or all-stops. Works as a CLI and as an agent skill for pi/Claude Code. Supports all Spanish  commuter rail networks.
